overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 game footage showing a first-person nighttime exploration of a dystopian waterfront district. The player walks from a foggy canal promenade past a towering corporate building, through an industrial zone with abandoned vehicles and shipping containers, and finally through a container corridor into a trash-filled enclosure. The atmosphere is moody and rain-slicked with teal neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade with the canal on the right and the towering corporate building ahead

entered.detail: tall brutalist skyscraper with illuminated 03 signage near the top
dark waterway reflecting the city lights along the right side
large overpass structure spanning across the middle distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked waterfront promenade at night, dominated by a massive corporate tower with glowing 03 signage. The camera moves forward along the concrete walkway, with an elevated highway bridge visible ahead and neon lights reflecting off the canal waters to the right.

events.description: turns left away from the waterfront into an industrial parking area with abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: turning left away from the waterfront and walking past abandoned cars and cardboard debris

entered.detail: derelict white sports car with broken windows parked on the left
scattered cardboard boxes and trash littering the asphalt ground
dark industrial warehouse structure with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the open waterfront to a sheltered industrial parking area beneath an overpass. The camera turns left, passing an abandoned white sports car and scattered cardboard debris on the wet asphalt, moving deeper into the industrial zone.

events.description: entering deeper industrial area with stacked shipping containers and crates

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial yard between shipping containers and stacked cargo

entered.detail: large blue metal shipping container with corrugated walls
piles of wooden cargo crates and boxes stacked on pallets
tall industrial scaffolding and metal framework against the sky

segments.scene_description: Moving through a cluttered industrial yard filled with blue shipping containers and stacked wooden crates. The ground is littered with debris and puddles reflecting the overhead lights, while metal scaffolding structures rise in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: shipping container corridor with emergency lighting

events.description: entering a narrow shipping container corridor
lighting shifts to dark red emergency lights inside the container

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow metal corridor of a shipping container illuminated by red emergency lights

entered.detail: narrow metal passageway formed by shipping containers with corrugated walls
glowing red emergency lighting fixtures on the container ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow shipping container corridor, transitioning from the open yard to an enclosed metal passageway. The environment is bathed in red emergency lighting, creating a claustrophobic atmosphere as the camera moves toward the distant exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced trash enclosure with overgrown vegetation

events.description: exiting the container into a fenced enclosure filled with garbage and weeds

agents.ego_description: exiting the container corridor into a small fenced area with trash piles and overgrown grass

entered.detail: tall chain-link security fence with metal posts
barbed wire topping the fence along the left side
piles of black and blue garbage bags and scattered refuse
tall wild grass and weeds growing through the cracked pavement

segments.scene_description: Exiting the container corridor, the scene opens into a small enclosed yard surrounded by chain-link fencing topped with barbed wire. The ground is covered with overgrown weeds and scattered trash bags, illuminated by harsh security lights, creating a neglected, post-industrial atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-slicked corporate waterfront into a claustrophobic, trash-strewn industrial enclosure. It begins on a concrete promenade beneath a massive corporate tower with glowing signage, moving forward past neon reflections on the canal waters toward an elevated highway bridge. As the camera passes under the overpass, the open vista shifts into a sheltered parking area where it turns left past an abandoned sports car and scattered debris. The scene then expands into a cluttered industrial yard of blue shipping containers and wooden crates before narrowing into a metal corridor bathed in oppressive red emergency lighting. Finally, the camera exits the passageway into a small, fenced-in yard filled with overgrown weeds and trash bags under the glare of harsh security lights.
